http:listener-config.name: HTTP_Listener_Config
http:listener-config.doc:name: HTTP Listener Config
http:listener-config.doc:description: Configures inbound HTTP listener for receiving requests

http:listener-connection.doc:name: HTTP Listener Connection
http:listener-connection.doc:description: Defines host, port and protocol support for HTTP listener

http:request-config.name: Switchee_API_Config
http:request-config.doc:name: Switchee API Config
http:request-config.doc:description: Configures outbound HTTP requests to the Switchee API service

http:request-connection.doc:name: HTTP Request Connection
http:request-connection.doc:description: Defines connection settings and protocol support for HTTP requests
